capability_next_safe_steps.repo_status: Inspect repository status, branches and default settings in read-only mode first.
capability_next_safe_steps.commits: Review commit history and diff metadata before any draft or branch proposal.
capability_next_safe_steps.pull_requests: Inspect pull request metadata and review state before drafting changes.
capability_next_safe_steps.actions_read: Review workflow and run metadata without dispatching anything.
capability_next_safe_steps.issues_read: Review issues and labels without writing or triaging changes automatically.
capability_next_safe_steps.pr_draft: Prepare a draft PR plan or body for human review before any branch mutation.
capability_next_safe_steps.branch_write: Use a sandbox branch or fork only after explicit approval, rollback planning and human review.
capability_next_safe_steps.merge: Keep merges blocked; use read-only inspection or draft PR review first.
capability_next_safe_steps.workflow_dispatch: Keep workflow execution blocked; inspect workflow files and run history first.
capability_next_safe_steps.secrets_access: Secrets access stays blocked; do not request or inspect credentials through Atlas.
capability_next_safe_steps.delete: Deletion stays blocked; review repository state and propose a manual cleanup plan instead.
capability_next_safe_steps.force_push: Force push stays blocked; review branch strategy and prepare a manual remediation plan instead.
